scripts.build: tsc && vite build && move dist\index.html dist\meltdown.html
scripts.test: npx tsx src/simulation/test-suite.ts && npx tsx scripts/test-flow-physics.ts
scripts.test:all: npx tsx src/simulation/test-suite.ts && npx tsx scripts/test-flow-physics.ts && npx tsx scripts/test-plant-scenarios.ts
